V

valueChanged(ValueEvent) - Method in class com.softsynth.tools.jsyn.PortKnob
Required to implement KnobListener.
valueChanged(ValueEvent) - Method in class com.softsynth.tools.view.EditableRotaryKnob
 
valueChanged(ValueEvent) - Method in interface com.softsynth.view.ValueListener
Handle a value change.
ValueController - Interface in com.softsynth.view
Interface for CustomFaderDouble, etc.
ValueEvent - Class in com.softsynth.view
Event used with ValueListener interface.
ValueEvent(Object, double) - Constructor for class com.softsynth.view.ValueEvent
 
ValueEvent(Object) - Constructor for class com.softsynth.view.ValueEvent
 
ValueListener - Interface in com.softsynth.view
Interface to get values back from a DoubleController.
VERBOSE - Static variable in class com.softsynth.jsyn.Synth
Value for verbosity, full debug output.
verbosity - Static variable in class com.softsynth.jsyn.Synth
Deprecated. Use setTrace() instead.
VERSION - Static variable in class com.softsynth.jsyn.Synth
Version of the Java code for JSyn that you compiled with.
VERTICAL - Static variable in class com.softsynth.jsyn.view102.InternalCustomFader
 
VERTICAL - Static variable in class com.softsynth.view.CustomFader
 
VoiceAllocator - Class in com.softsynth.jsyn.util
Voice Allocator for managing the allocation and reuse of voices.
VoiceAllocator(SynthContext, int) - Constructor for class com.softsynth.jsyn.util.VoiceAllocator
Specify the maximum number of voices that can be allocated at a time.
VoiceAllocator(int) - Constructor for class com.softsynth.jsyn.util.VoiceAllocator
